caption: A recording of a computer screen displays a website for "JASYPS CASEBREAKS.COM," which features a listing for a "2020-21 PANINI OBSIDIAN BASKETBALL FOTL 1ST OFF THE LINE 1-BOX BREAK #5 *RANDOM DIVISION*". The product image shows a basketball card of Stephen Curry. The listing specifies a price of "$99.99" and includes details stating that "Each Box contains Two Autographs and Two Inserts or Parallels!" and "8 spots. Everyone gets a random division in the NBA all cards ship!". An "ADD TO CART" button is visible beneath the price. Along the bottom of the screen, a red banner encourages viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" with a red "Subscribe" button. The visuals remain static throughout the sequence, with no people present and no changes in the layout, text, or imagery across the frames.
